titles.en: The true believer's power and fearlessness in faith
The true believer's power and fearlessness in faith

segments: : إِنَّ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ مَنْ يَخَافُهُ كُلُّ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ ذَلِكَ أَنَّهُ عَزِيزٌ فِي دِينِ اَللَّهِ وَ لاَ يَخَافُ مِنْ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ هُوَ عَلاَمَةُ كُلِّ مُؤْمِنٍ.
arabic.text: : إِنَّ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ مَنْ يَخَافُهُ كُلُّ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ ذَلِكَ أَنَّهُ عَزِيزٌ فِي دِينِ اَللَّهِ وَ لاَ يَخَافُ مِنْ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ هُوَ عَلاَمَةُ كُلِّ مُؤْمِنٍ.

segments: (The same previous series of relaters)… from Mohammed bin Ahmed from Abu al-Alaa that Abu Abdullah (a) said: The true believer is feared by everything, for he is powerful in the religion of Allah and he does not fear anything. This is the distinctive feature of the believers.
en.badr-shahin.text: (The same previous series of relaters)… from Mohammed bin Ahmed from Abu al-Alaa that Abu Abdullah (a) said: The true believer is feared by everything, for he is powerful in the religion of Allah and he does not fear anything. This is the distinctive feature of the believers.

narratorChain.raw: وَ بِهَذَا اَلْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْعَلاَءِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع قَالَ
